title: ConSpan culvert — mild unsteady constant Q (mode 2 implicit)

parity_program.notes: Same mild case as Chunk 4 with hybrid implicit culvert inlet coupling (mode 2).

scope.notes: ConSpan arch culvert; inlet-controlled at Q=1000 cfs. Mode 2 replaces reach momentum row with culvert_headwater_residual.

stream1d.notes: Hybrid implicit inlet-control culvert (ConSpan arch eligible); explicit fallback for outlet/overtopping.

reference.notes: Same HEC-RAS plan 03 HDF reference as mode 0 (Chunk 4).
